sections.paragraph:
verb להיגלות

to appear; be exposed, revealed, disclosed

verb להתגלות

to appear before; be exposed; publicized

verb להגלות

to banish, expel

verb הוגלה

be banished, expelled

verb לגלות (>>לְגַלּוֹת)

to discover; unravel, expose; publicize

masculine noun

wave, ripple, roller, ruffle, gale, gaul, sea, billow

masculine noun

heap, pile

noun

Gal (name)
